label: Porosity
description: Small cavities or holes in the bead

label: Excessive Spatter
description: Spatter that is grainy and large

label: Crooked/Wavy Bead
description: Crooked or wavy bead pattern

label: Burn-Through
description: Base material melts away, leaving a hole in the weld

label: Inadequate Penetration
description: Weld does not penetrate the joint fully, just on the surface

label: Excess Penetration or Burn-Through
description: Weld droops on top and underneath, or falls through entirely, making a hole

label: Bend at Joint
description: Weld bends at the joint

label: Weld Not Adhering Properly
description: Gaps present between weld and previous bead or between weld and workpiece

label: Incorrect Polarity
description: Polarity not set correctly for type of welding

label: Insufficient Shielding Gas
description: Inadequate flow of shielding gas in MIG welding

label: Incorrect Shielding Gas
description: Wrong type of shielding gas used

label: Dirty Workpiece or Welding Wire
description: Workpiece or wire has oil, coatings, or other residues

label: Inconsistent Travel Speed
description: Travel speed is not steady during welding

label: CTWD Too Long
description: Contact tube to work distance exceeds recommended length

label: Wire Feeding Too Fast
description: Wire feed speed is excessive

label: Workpiece Overheating
description: Workpiece temperature becomes too high

label: Travel Speed Too Slow
description: Travel speed is insufficient

label: Excessive Material at Weld
description: Too much wire material being deposited

label: Incorrect Welding Technique
description: Improper gun angle, arc placement, or bead positioning

label: Insufficient Weld Heat
description: Weld temperature is too low

label: Workpieces Too Thick or Close
description: Gap between workpieces is too narrow or material is too thick

label: Insufficient Weld Material
description: Not enough wire material being deposited

label: Improper Clamping
description: Workpieces not securely clamped or tacked

label: Excessive Heat
description: Heat input is too high

label: Inaccurate Welding
description: Lack of hand steadiness during welding

label: Workpiece Gap Too Narrow
description: Gap between workpieces is insufficient

label: Check Polarity Setting
description: Check that polarity is set correctly for type of welding

label: Increase Gas Flow
description: Increase flow of shielding gas and clean nozzle

label: Use Correct Shielding Gas
description: Use shielding gas recommended by wire supplier

label: Clean Workpiece and Wire
description: Clean workpiece down to bare metal and ensure wire is clean and free from oil, coatings, and residues

label: Maintain Steady Travel Speed
description: Keep travel speed consistent throughout welding

label: Reduce CTWD
description: Reduce contact tube to work distance to less than 1/2 inch

label: Reduce Wire Feed Speed
description: Decrease the wire feed speed

label: Reduce Weld Current
description: Decrease the weld current output

label: Increase Travel Speed
description: Move welding torch faster and keep travel speed steady

label: Reduce Current or Wire Feed Speed
description: Decrease weld current and/or wire feed speed to prevent overheating

label: Clamp Workpieces Securely
description: Clamp workpieces securely and make tack welds to hold them

label: Cool Between Passes
description: Weld a small portion and allow to cool before proceeding

label: Correct Welding Technique
description: Maintain proper CTWD, keep arc on leading edge of puddle, hold MIG gun at proper angles, place stringer bead correctly, adjust workpiece position

label: Increase Weld Current
description: Increase the weld current output

label: Increase Wire Feed Speed
description: Increase the wire feed speed

label: Bevel Thick Workpieces and Allow Gap
description: Bevel thick workpieces, allow slight gap, and weld in several passes

label: Widen Groove or Increase Bevel
description: Widen the groove or increase bevel to provide adequate space

label: Use Two Hands or Steady Surface
description: Use two hands or rest hand on steady surface to maintain accuracy

label: MIG Welding
description: Metal Inert Gas welding process

label: Flux-Cored Welding
description: Flux-cored wire welding process

label: Stick Welding
description: Stick welding process

label: TIG Welding
description: Tungsten Inert Gas welding process

label: MIG Duty Cycle
description: Operating duty cycle specification for MIG welding

label: CTWD Specification
description: Contact tube to work distance should be maintained at 1/2 inch or less for proper results

label: Proper Weld Penetration
description: Weld is visible underneath and bulges slightly on top

label: Stick Weld
description: Stick welding process using electrodes

label: Current Too Low
description: Welding current is insufficient for proper weld formation

label: Current Too High
description: Welding current is excessive causing spatter and wide bead

label: Weld Speed Too Fast
description: Welding speed is too rapid resulting in narrow irregular bead

label: Weld Speed Too Slow
description: Welding speed is too slow causing wide flat bead and excess heat

label: Arc Length Too Short
description: Distance between electrode and workpiece is too small

label: Arc Length Too Long
description: Distance between electrode and workpiece is too large

label: Workpieces Too Thick or Close
description: Workpiece thickness or joint gap prevents proper weld penetration

label: Dirty Workpiece
description: Workpiece surface contaminated with oil, coatings, or other residues

label: Distance Between Workpieces Too Large
description: Gap between workpieces is too large for proper welding

label: Inconsistent Welding Speed
description: Welding speed is not maintained steady throughout the weld

label: Dirty Fill Material or Electrode
description: Fill material or electrode contaminated with oil, coatings, or residues

label: Increase Current
description: Increase the welding current to provide more heat and penetration

label: Decrease Current
description: Decrease the welding current to reduce heat and penetration

label: Weld Slower
description: Reduce welding speed to allow more time for material fusion and heat penetration

label: Weld Faster
description: Increase welding speed to reduce heat input and penetration

label: Increase Arc Distance
description: Increase the distance between electrode and workpiece

label: Decrease Arc Distance
description: Decrease the distance between electrode and workpiece

label: Keep Arc on Leading Edge of Weld Puddle
description: Position the arc at the leading edge of the weld puddle for proper fusion

label: Hold Torch at Proper Angles
description: Maintain proper torch and electrode angles during welding

label: Slow Down for Fill Material Fusion
description: Reduce welding speed to allow fill material sufficient time to melt into weld location

label: Bevel Thick Workpieces
description: Cut beveled edges on thick workpieces to improve weld penetration

label: Allow Slight Gap Between Workpieces
description: Ensure proper gap between workpieces and weld in several passes

label: Place Stringer Bead at Correct Location
description: Position stringer bead at proper location in the joint

label: Adjust Workpiece Position or Weld Angle
description: Reposition workpiece or adjust weld angle to permit proper welding to bottom of piece

label: Increase Amount of Fill Material
description: Use more fill material or electrode to ensure sufficient weld material

label: Decrease Distance and Increase Bevel
description: Reduce gap between workpieces and increase bevel for better fit

label: Clamp Workpieces Securely
description: Use secure clamping to hold workpieces in position

label: Make Tack Welds
description: Create tack welds to hold workpieces in proper position

label: Weld Small Portions and Allow to Cool
description: Weld a small portion and allow it to cool before proceeding to avoid excessive heat buildup

label: Increase Weld Speed to Reduce Heat
description: Increase welding speed to reduce excessive heat accumulation

label: Clean Workpiece to Bare Metal
description: Remove all contaminants from workpiece surface down to bare metal

label: Clean Fill Material and Electrode
description: Ensure fill material and electrode are clean and free from oil, coatings, and residues

label: Maintain Steady Weld Speed
description: Keep welding speed consistent throughout the entire weld

label: Use Both Hands or Rest on Steady Surface
description: Use two hands or rest hand on steady surface for accurate welding control

description: Wrong size wire feed roller is installed for the wire diameter

description: Wire feed pressure setting is too high

description: Contact tip is wrong size for the wire being used

description: MIG gun liner is damaged

description: Welding arc is unstable or fluctuating

description: Wire feed system is not operating correctly

description: Polarity setting is incorrect for the welding process being run
